title: Official Eva FINAL updated NTV Preview thread
display_title: Official Eva FINAL updated NTV Preview thread
wikitext:
[]: Official Eva FINAL updated NTV Preview thread Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 04, 2014 11:32 am Got news or video links about the anticipated new/updated preview for FINAL Friday morning? Post it here! NOTE: Please post only in this thread for the new FINAL preview! Duplicate threads will be locked to avoid clutter and redundancy. Post your film speculation in here tomorrow once the Preview's out. Until then, news/updates only please! Thank you!

[]: Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 04, 2014 6:52 pm What part of news/updates only was hard to understand? Nonsense has been purged.

[]: Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Sep 05, 2014 7:06 am Well, it's aired by now. You'd think we'd have some footage.

[]: Post by obliterates » Fri Sep 05, 2014 7:08 am No it hasn't. 10AM EST. In two more hours.

[]: Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Sep 05, 2014 7:09 am Aw man.

[]: Post by lastcody » Fri Sep 05, 2014 7:10 am It literally just started God Warrior is on right now

[]: Post by zpoop » Fri Sep 05, 2014 7:54 am Well fuck everything. I mean with all due respectacles and all I just gotta bread soon and I don't wanna stay up for 3 hours just to find out anno is dicking me around again. that dick.

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 8:47 am It's time. The movie is ending right now I think. No credits, less footage. 105 minutes-10 I think. Edit: Wait, then it's over already. If I find something I post it.

[]: Post by Dataprime » Fri Sep 05, 2014 8:48 am It's finally happening?

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 8:50 am Dataprime wrote: It's finally happening?

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Sep 05, 2014 8:55 am TITLE CONFIRMED. 3.0+1.0.

[]: Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:00 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: TITLE CONFIRMED. 3.0+1.0.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:01 am No preview. It was literally just two title cards. First it was just NEXT And then this: I for one and going to celebrate. Thank fuck there's no date yet. That gives me more time to learn moon and save up for a trip to Japan to see it. FUCK YES.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:05 am My brain has recognized that there's no preview and the rest of me doesn't want to accept that. But hey, at least we got the the title. TM's post sums it up: there was some white text that said NEXT and then right after that, the shot he posted.

[]: Post by Dataprime » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:05 am It all returns to nothing

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:08 am [url]http://evangelion.co.jp/[/url] has been updated with new title.

[]: Post by distopia » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:13 am evangelion fb page updated: https://www.facebook.com/evangelion.co.jp/photos/a.237754642989149.47794.193616700736277/633102966787646/?type=1&theater

[]: Post by hui43210 » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:15 am Not even a release timeframe...... WHAT THE HELL!

[]: Post by Tabby » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:16 am At first I was really upset because I thought they were just going to rehash 1.0 and 3.0 and give us nothing new, but then I realized 1 plus 3 is 4. Just to clarify, this is just Anno being Anno with the title, right?

[]: Post by Dataprime » Fri Sep 05, 2014 9:19 am What's the deal with the "N"? Why aren't the other letters like that? What could it possibly mean!?
